Opcode.name: PCM_OP_PYMT_GET_SEPA_REQUEST_INFO
Opcode.Doc: This opcode is to fetch all the information required by pin_sepa application to generate the Sepa request XML file. The opcode will take a set of Sepa request objects as input and return the information related to those transactions.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Typeonly poid of the sepa object for which the data is required.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_POIDS
Array.Doc: Array of Sepa request object poids for which the data is required

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Typeonly poid of the sepa object for which the data is retrieved.

String.name: PIN_FLD_MSG_ID
String.Doc: Creditor's unique file reference id. Unique for the Sepa request file sent to bank for processing

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_PAYMENT
Substruct.Doc: Populated only for reversal requests. Holds group header details of the payment request sent to bank for processing

String.name: PIN_FLD_MSG_ID
String.Doc: Unique file Id of the original payment request sent to the bank.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_PYMT_INFO
Array.Doc: Array of payment information sorted by Creditor ID. This array will hold the Sepa transactions for a particular creditor/debtor.

String.name: PIN_FLD_PYMT_INFO_ID
String.Doc: Unique identification assigned by the creditor to unambiguously identify a particular PmtInf element in the Sepa request file.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CREDITOR_ID
String.Doc: Unique identification of the creditor.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_PAYMENT
Substruct.Doc: Populated only for reversal requests. Holds payment group details of the payment request sent to bank for processing

String.name: PIN_FLD_PYMT_INFO_ID
String.Doc: Identifier of the payment group whose transaction is being reversed.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_TOTAL_RECORDS
Int.Doc: Total number of transactions that were part of this payment group.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_TRANSACTIONS
Array.Doc: Array of Sepa transactions (either DD, CT or reversal).

String.name: PIN_FLD_TRANS_ID
String.Doc: Unique reference id for a particular financial transaction.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_COLLECTION_DATE
Timestamp.Doc: The date by which bank must process the transaction.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: The amount for which the payment is made.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CURRENCY
Int.Doc: Currency in which payment is made.

String.name: PIN_FLD_RESOURCE_NAME
String.Doc: ISO 4217 alpha-3 representation of the currency.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_MANDATE_TYPE
Enum.Doc: This field specifies the sequence type of payment collection. Valid values are: FRST (1), RCUR (2), FNAL (3), OOFF (4)

Int.name: PIN_FLD_MANDATE_AMENDED
Int.Doc: Specifies what fields have been amended. Will be 0 if no amendment has happened since last transaction processing.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_ORIG_MANDATE_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Original Mandate information. This substruct will be present if MANDATE_AMENDED is non-zero. Contains original value of the fields which have got amended.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CREDITOR_ID
String.Doc: Original creditor ID.

String.name: PIN_FLD_IBAN
String.Doc: Original debtor IBAN

String.name: PIN_FLD_BIC
String.Doc: Original debtor BIC.

String.name: PIN_FLD_MANDATE_UNIQUE_REFERENCE
String.Doc: Original mandate reference number.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CREDITOR_NAME
String.Doc: Original creditor name.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_PAYMENT
Substruct.Doc: Populted only for reversal requests. Holds transaction and debtor details that were used for making a payment.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TRANS_ID
String.Doc: Transaction Id of the payment.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CURRENCY
Int.Doc: Currency in which the payment was collected.

String.name: PIN_FLD_RESOURCE_NAME
String.Doc: ISO 4217 alpha-3 representation of the currency in which payment was collected.

String.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_CODE
String.Doc: Reason of reversing the payment.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_COLLECTION_DATE
Timestamp.Doc: The date by which bank must processed the payment transaction.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: The amount for which the payment was made.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_DEBTOR_INFO
Array.Doc: Holds debtor details using which the payment was initiated.

String.name: PIN_FLD_IBAN
String.Doc: Debtor IBAN

String.name: PIN_FLD_BIC
String.Doc: Debtor BIC.

String.name: PIN_FLD_MANDATE_UNIQUE_REFERENCE
String.Doc: Mandate reference number.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_MANDATE_TYPE
Enum.Doc: Mandate type during sepa payment initiation.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
